headline: CrowdStrike Surges 5%, Palo Alto and Okta Gain 4% as Cybersecurity Stocks Rally on Analyst Upgrades
summary: Shares of major cybersecurity names are rallying in Monday’s midday session. CrowdStrike Holdings (NASDAQ:CRWD) stock is up 5% to $204 and change, leading the group higher. Palo Alto Networks (NASDAQ:PANW) shares are climbing 4% to $363, and Okta (NASDAQ:OKTA) stock is up 4% to $147. The Amplify Cybersecurity ETF (NYSE ARCA:HACK) is also higher, with ... CrowdStrike Surges 5%, Palo Alto and Okta Gain 4% as Cybersecurity Stocks Rally on Analyst Upgrades
